experience.description: Developing autonomous drone systems with ArduPilot and MAVLink. Building IoT solutions with ESP32 and STM32 microcontrollers. Contributing to open-source embedded tools.
Built and maintain Code Janitor, a VS Code extension for autocorrect and syntax fixing across multiple programming languages. 1,500+ marketplace installs.
